name: Growth Report — Cover Slide
description: Cover Slide of the Growth Report design template. Editorial business-report layout preserved as raw OOXML with scheme-color refs so it adopts the active theme. All visible text is AI-fillable — the source PPTX was already pre-templated with placeholder slots.
ai_hint: Cover Slide from the Growth Report business-report design template. Best when the user is building a growth report, investor update, market analysis, quarterly business review, or executive summary. Provide the placeholder values listed in content_schema.Never truncate the text, always keep the sentence complete.

coverpage_title.hint: Coverpage title, MAX 20 chars. Title case. — Do not truncate or cut words.

coverpage_subtitle.hint: Coverpage subtitle. MAX 45 characters — Do not truncate or cut words.

header_subtitle.hint: Header subtitle. MAX 12 characters — Do not truncate or cut words.

header_company_name.hint: Header company name. MAX 18 characters — Do not truncate or cut words.

coverpage_tagline.hint: Coverpage tagline. MAX 59 characters — Do not truncate or cut words.

coverpage_year.hint: Coverpage year. MAX 4 characters — Do not truncate or cut words.

elements._note: Imported from GrowthReport_AI_Template.pptx slide1.xml. 0 <p:pic> stripped during ingest. <p:bg> extracted from master and prepended as full-canvas rect. 0 icon + 0 image placeholder(s) extracted via layer-name convention (0 geometry resolved from slide layout). EMU coords (914400/in). Scheme-color refs resolve via active theme (theme1.xml clrScheme copied verbatim from source PPT).
